title: Saranjana: Kota Ghaib
overview: A band’s vocalist, Sitha, mysteriously disappears before their concert in Kotabaru, South Kalimantan. The band learns she's in Saranjana, a supernatural city believed to be advanced and hidden. To bring her back, they must journey through horror and mystical events to find the portal to Saranjana.
